description: What the project must deliver. Functional and non-functional requirements with MoSCoW priority and lifecycle states (proposed, accepted, implemented, verified). The contract between intent and implementation.
title: Requirements

status.description: Requirement lifecycle. Intentionally divergent from pi-context://schemas/status (which uses workflow-shaped todo/in_progress/blocked/complete/unknown); requirements use a 5-state proposed→verified flow. Reconciliation.

priority.description: MoSCoW priority. Intentionally divergent from pi-context://schemas/priority (which uses p- prefix for workflow-vocabulary fragility classification). Reconciliation.

source.description: How this requirement was created. Intentionally divergent subset/variant of pi-context://schemas/source (which is human/agent/monitor/workflow); requirements substitute 'analysis' for monitor/workflow because requirements originate from analytical work products, not runtime emitters. Reconciliation.

traces_to.description: Phase or task IDs that implement this

depends_on.description: IDs of other requirements this depends on
